sections_cited: Section 4 of the Sindh Service Tribunal Act

chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1506 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.2699/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.5982/2022 (Ex.A) 4. For orders on CMA No.5983/2022 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 18.04.2023 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the petitioner <><><><>..<><><><> The matter is already fixed on 22.08.2023. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that he under instructions does not press the instant petition if the Appeal / Representation made by the petitioner against his suspension is decided by the Competent Authority within one month hereof. The urgent application is treated as an application for antedate hearing of the matter and in view of the statement of learned counsel this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications with directions to concerned Authority to decide the Appeal / Representation of the petitioner already preferred within thirty days hereof; however, in case of failure the petitioner shall approach the Sindh Service Tribunal in view of Section 4 of the Sindh Service Tribunal Act, 1973. Judge Judge ARBROHI
